parse_rules: From get_customer_by_phone output set task_state.customer_id (Customer.customer_id).
From get_customer_by_phone output set task_state.candidate_line_ids (Customer.line_ids list).
Set task_state.candidate_line_ids to the customer's line_ids list VERBATIM as a JSON array, e.g. ["L1001","L1002","L1003"] — the resolver walks it one at a time.

executor_sys_rules: Call get_details_by_id with args {"id": "<FIRST id in task_state.candidate_line_ids>"} once.
parse_rules: Look at the single line returned by get_details_by_id.
IF that line's phone_number == task_state.phone_number: set task_state.line_id = that line's line_id (you are done).

OTHERWISE (the phone_number does NOT match): do NOT set line_id. Instead set task_state.candidate_line_ids to the SAME list with its FIRST element removed, so the next call inspects the next candidate line. Keep walking until a phone_number matches.

executor_sys_rules: Read-only; never apply a fix here.
parse_rules: From check_network_status output set task_state.airplane_mode (from 'Airplane Mode: ON/OFF' line: ON->true, OFF->false).
From check_network_status output set task_state.sim_status (from 'SIM Card Status: <v>': one of active|missing|locked_pin|locked_puk).
From check_network_status output set task_state.service_status (from 'Cellular Connection: <v>': one of connected|no_service|searching).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From toggle_airplane_mode output set task_state.airplane_mode (from 'Airplane Mode is now ON/OFF.' line: ON->true, OFF->false).
From check_network_status output set task_state.service_status (from 'Cellular Connection: <v>': one of connected|no_service|searching).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From reseat_sim_card output set task_state.sim_status (successful reseat means missing->active, otherwise current SIM status remains active|locked_pin|locked_puk).
From check_network_status output set task_state.service_status (from 'Cellular Connection: <v>': one of connected|no_service|searching).

executor_sys_rules: Read-only; never apply a fix here.
parse_rules: From check_apn_settings output set task_state.apn_broken (from 'Current APN Name: <apn_name>': broken->true, internet|carrier|default and any non-broken value->false).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From reset_apn_settings output set task_state.apn_broken (reset is scheduled; after reboot Current APN Name becomes default so broken->false).

From reboot_device output set task_state.service_status (from Status Bar after reboot: ✈️ Airplane Mode or 📵 No Signal->no_service, signal indicator Poor|Fair|Good|Excellent with network technology->connected).

executor_sys_rules: Read-only; never apply a fix here.
parse_rules: From get_details_by_id output set task_state.line_suspended (from Line.status: Suspended->true, Active|Pending Activation|Closed->false).
From get_details_by_id output set task_state.contract_ended (from Line.contract_end_date compared to current date 2025-02-25: past date->true, null or today/future->false).
From get_details_by_id output set task_state.line_roaming_enabled (from Line.roaming_enabled: true->true, false->false).

If get_details_by_id output has Line.status == "Suspended" AND Line.contract_end_date is a past date before 2025-02-25, set task_state.contract_ended=true and do not treat the suspension as bill-payment-resumable; contract-ended suspension requires transfer_to_human_agents.
From get_bills_for_customer output set task_state.overdue_bill_id (first Bill.bill_id where Bill.status is Overdue; if no overdue bill then null).

executor_sys_rules: Never call send_payment_request when task_state.contract_ended == true; do not request or make payment for a contract-ended suspension, transfer_to_human_agents instead.
parse_rules: From send_payment_request output set task_state.payment_requested (return message 'Payment request sent to the customer for bill <bill_id>'->true, tool error/no message->false).

base_actions.when: task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From make_payment output set task_state.bill_paid (from output: 'Payment of <amount_due> USD has been made for bill <bill_id>.'->true, 'You do not have a payment request.'->false).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
Never call resume_line when task_state.contract_ended == true; contract-ended suspension is not self-service resumable and must be transferred to human agents.
parse_rules: From resume_line output set task_state.line_suspended (successful resume sets Line.status to Active: Suspended before resume->false, Active after resume->false).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From reboot_device output set task_state.service_status (from Status Bar after reboot: ✈️ Airplane Mode or 📵 No Signal->no_service, signal indicator Poor|Fair|Good|Excellent with network technology->connected).

executor_sys_rules: Call check_network_status (no arguments) once to confirm the final state.
parse_rules: From check_network_status output set task_state.service_status (from 'Cellular Connection: <v>': one of connected|no_service|searching).

executor_sys_rules: Escalate only when no remaining applicable fix exists.
parse_rules: From transfer_to_human_agents output set task_state.escalated (from output 'Transfer successful'->true, any tool error/no transfer->false).
After 'Transfer successful' set task_state.escalated=true. This ENDS the workflow — do NOT call transfer_to_human_agents again.

From run_speed_test output set task_state.data_available (from speed_test: no connection->false, excellent|good|fair|poor|very poor->true).

From run_speed_test output set task_state.speed_test (from parenthesized or failed description: Excellent->excellent, Good->good, Fair->fair, Poor->poor, Very Poor->very poor, No Connection->no connection).

base_actions.when: task_state.is_abroad == true and task_state.roaming_enabled_device == true and task_state.line_roaming_enabled != true

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From enable_roaming output set task_state.line_roaming_enabled (from output: 'Roaming enabled successfully'->true, 'Roaming was already enabled'->true).

From run_speed_test output set task_state.speed_test (from parenthesized or failed description: Excellent->excellent, Good->good, Fair->fair, Poor->poor, Very Poor->very poor, No Connection->no connection).

From run_speed_test output set task_state.speed_test (from parenthesized or failed description: Excellent->excellent, Good->good, Fair->fair, Poor->poor, Very Poor->very poor, No Connection->no connection).

parse_rules: From get_data_usage output set task_state.data_usage_exceeded (from returned numbers: data_used_gb > data_limit_gb + data_refueling_gb->true, data_used_gb <= data_limit_gb + data_refueling_gb->false).

executor_sys_rules: Toggle/set tools flip state; call each at most once, in order.
parse_rules: From refuel_data output set task_state.data_usage_exceeded (after successful refuel: if data_used_gb <= data_limit_gb + new_data_refueling_gb->false, otherwise true).

From run_speed_test output set task_state.speed_test (from parenthesized or failed description: Excellent->excellent, Good->good, Fair->fair, Poor->poor, Very Poor->very poor, No Connection->no connection).

For MMS tasks too, if get_data_usage shows data_used_gb > data_limit_gb + data_refueling_gb (for example 15.1 > 15.0 + 0.0), data_usage_exceeded is true and the next fix must call refuel_data before concluding MMS is unresolved.
